scenario.scene: Modern minimalist kitchen island with white marble countertop, light wood stools tucked under, soft cream wall behind, a small green plant in a ceramic pot on the counter. A bamboo whisk in a ceramic matcha bowl on the island, fresh matcha powder dusted on the bowl edge.
scenario.outfit: Oversized soft butter-yellow long-sleeve waffle-knit pullover, sleeves pushed up to her elbows, the pullover loose and falling off one shoulder slightly. Underneath, a thin white camisole strap visible. Cream linen drawstring shorts. Hair in a messy low bun with face-framing pieces. Bare feet.
scenario.pose: Standing at the kitchen island three-quarter angle to the camera, one hip leaning against the counter edge, looking softly down at the matcha bowl with a relaxed half-smile.

hand_assignment.other_hand_does: holds the bamboo whisk poised over the matcha bowl

scenario.grip_or_placement: Left hand at hip level resting against the counter edge, holding the Alluvi box in a relaxed casual grip — thumb on the top edge, four fingers along the bottom edge, box held flat horizontally with the front face angled three-quarters toward the camera.
scenario.lighting: Soft morning daylight pouring through a window slightly out of frame on the left, warm bone tones across the marble countertop, gentle warm side-light on her left arm and on the box's front face.
scenario.palette: butter yellow, white marble, light wood, matcha green, cream
scenario.framing: three-quarter (waist up, with counter surface visible)
resolves_failure_modes: outfit lock — saturated yellow oversized completely unlike persona reference
scenario.notes: Outfit deliberately loose and saturated. Tests outfit override and drape rendering.

step_1_output.step_1_image_prompt: A 25-year-old Mediterranean woman with sun-kissed deep-tan skin, green almond eyes, and brunette-with-blonde-balayage waves to her mid-back, captured in a candid amateur smartphone snapshot with natural skin texture and visible pores. She is wearing an oversized soft butter-yellow long-sleeve waffle-knit pullover, sleeves pushed up to her elbows, the pullover loose and falling off one shoulder slightly, a thin white camisole strap visible underneath, cream linen drawstring shorts, hair in a messy low bun with face-framing pieces, bare feet. She stands at a modern minimalist kitchen island with a white marble countertop, light wood stools tucked under, soft cream wall behind, a small green plant in a ceramic pot on the counter, a bamboo whisk resting in a ceramic matcha bowl with fresh matcha powder dusted on the bowl edge. Standing three-quarter angle to the camera, one hip leaning against the counter edge, looking softly down at the matcha bowl with a relaxed half-smile. Both hands are visible in the frame, not in her pockets, not behind her back, not cropped out of frame. Her right hand holds the bamboo whisk poised over the matcha bowl. Her left hand rests at hip level against the counter edge, fingers in a relaxed open position, currently empty. Soft morning daylight pours through a window slightly out of frame on the left, warm bone tones across the marble countertop, gentle warm side-light on her left arm. Shot on iPhone 15 Pro 35mm equivalent. Real photograph, not AI-generated, no model pose, candid moment. Slow Saturday morning unhurried mood, palette of butter yellow, white marble, light wood, matcha green, cream. Reference image is the persona — preserve her face, eye color, eye shape, brow shape, nose shape, lip shape, jaw line, and hair color exactly. Do not improvise her face.

fal_pulid_params.negative_prompt: extra limbs, deformed hands, mutated hands, bad anatomy, lowres, blurry, watermark, text, signature, extra fingers, fused fingers, distorted face, asymmetric eyes, unnatural skin texture, plastic skin, AI-generated look, model pose, perfect symmetry, smooth airbrushed skin, glossy plastic skin, illustration, 3D render, CGI, doll-like features, magazine retouching

step_2_brief.intended_grip_or_placement: Left hand at hip level resting against the counter edge, holding the Alluvi box in a relaxed casual grip — thumb on the top edge, four fingers along the bottom edge, box held flat horizontally with the front face angled three-quarters toward the camera.
step_2_brief.intended_product_position: Step 2 will adjust her left hand and forearm to physically hold the Alluvi box at hip level against the counter edge. The wrist angle, finger curl, and box tilt are determined by Step 2 based on actual product geometry, with the box's front face catching the warm morning side-light from the left.

id_weight_recommendation.reasoning: id_weight at fal API cap (1.0). true_cfg at default 1.5 — three-quarter waist-up framing with face mid-importance, default sufficient alongside the dramatic butter-yellow off-shoulder outfit override which is the primary lock-breaking challenge here.

step_2_output.step_2_image_prompt: Take the persona reference photo as the locked source for her face, hair color and styling in the messy low bun, body proportions, oversized butter-yellow waffle-knit pullover falling off one shoulder with white camisole strap visible, cream linen drawstring shorts, bare feet, and the entire minimalist kitchen island scene including the white marble countertop, light wood stools, cream wall, ceramic potted plant, and the bamboo whisk in the matcha bowl with dusted matcha powder — all of these must remain faithful to the reference. She is now holding the Alluvi product in her left hand at hip level resting against the counter edge: her left arm relaxed and slightly bent, wrist softly angled, fingers in a casual grip with thumb along the top edge of the box, four fingers along the bottom edge, the box held flat horizontally with the front face angled three-quarters toward the camera so the packaging is clearly visible. The product is approximately 7 inches wide, sized realistically relative to her hand and hip. Her body posture and arm angle may shift slightly to make the holding pose look natural and not stamped on. Both hands must remain visible in the frame — her left hand visibly grips the product at hip level, her right hand continues to hold the bamboo whisk poised over the matcha bowl. Do not hide either hand in pockets, behind her back, behind her body, or crop them out of the frame. The Alluvi product packaging must match the product reference photo exactly — every text element, color, graphic, and certification badge as shown. Preserve the packaging's natural white base color; the scene's warm morning light should illuminate the white surface as light, not tint the white yellow or cream. Match the lighting direction of the persona scene: soft morning daylight pouring through a window slightly out of frame on the left, warm bone tones across the marble countertop, gentle warm side-light on her left arm and on the box's front face, with a soft shadow falling toward the right.
